calendar.matters:
Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-02-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis,
CSR: B. Fields, #7235

FIRST BANK, Esq. for Plaintiff: John Stewart Company.
Plaintiff's Witness Brenda Hutcherson was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant VERECOM TECHNOLOGIES, INC.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 550 MONTGOMER STREET, STE. #208 & #608 San Francisco, CA 94111.
The lease is forfeited.

PAST-DUE RENT & LATE FEES THRU APRIL 2010 - $124,327.74
RENT FROM MAY THRU SEPT 2010 - $40,000.00
ATTORNEYS FEES & Costs - $6358.94
CREDIT FOR PAYMT REC'D - ($50,000.00)
Total - $120,686.68

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
Application For Entry Of Judgment And To Fix Attorneys Fees

Application For Order Allowing Entry Of Judgment As To The Appearing Deft And To Fix Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Apr-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
John McCardle, Esq. of Kraft Opich, 916-880-3040 for plaintiff and moving party First Bank, A Missouri State Bank
William Lynn, Esq. of Oddie, Lynn, Grisanti, 415-296-9600 for defendant and opposing party International Business Times.
